response:
Sec. 1  
Allergies to peanuts are immune system reactions to proteins found in peanuts  
These reactions can cause symptoms such as hives swelling difficulty breathing  
Living underwater is not related to these symptoms  
People who are allergic to peanuts can live underwater if they avoid peanuts  
Sec. 2  
The inability to live underwater is not caused by peanut allergies  
Underwater living requires specific conditions such as oxygen supply pressure resistance  
These are unrelated to allergic reactions  
Therefore people who are allergic to peanuts can live underwater provided they avoid peanuts and have the necessary equipment
